summary: Strong TypeScript implementation with excellent typing and error handling. Workflow is functional but lacks hardening: no `set -euo pipefail` on bash steps; Bun installed via curl script rather than community action; `actions/checkout@v4` not pinned to full SHA (only version tag). Formatter lines 39–55 repeat similar map operations; could factor into helper. Argument parsing (index.ts lines 10–36) lacks edge-case handling (e.g. `--config` without value). Core logic is clean, modular, and testable. No critical issues; minor hygiene improvements recommended.
